regime_fall.current_status: Following the April 19 ceasefire expiry and US strikes on Iranian nuclear facilities, military escalation has intensified with confirmed US casualties (12 killed, 415 wounded), vessel seizures, and a blockade reducing Strait of Hormuz traffic dramatically, while Iran rejects diplomatic overtures and hardliners consolidate control amid ongoing internal unrest and economic deterioration. Diplomatic channels remain open but both sides maintain hardened positions with prediction markets pricing regime collapse by end-2026 at only 13.5%, suggesting structural stability despite unprecedented internal and external pressures.
regime_fall.last_major_event: The Pentagon confirmed 415 American troops wounded and 12 killed in Operation Epic Fury as of April 20, 2026, representing significant US military costs in the escalating confrontation.
